hero_tagline: Discover and share Gestura menus and search engines.
hero_sub: The extension works entirely without this index — it is an optional, free add-on.
browse_empty_hint: Try a different search or filter.
detail_transform_warning: This version contains executable code (transformCode). Only install it if you trust the author.
docs_meta_description: How the Gestura exchange format works: menus, search engines, fields and validation rules.
docs_intro: Gestura menus and search engines can be exported, shared and imported as portable JSON files. This index stores and distributes them, but the format itself does not depend on it: the browser extension can import and export these files directly, with no server involved.
docs_optional_note: The extension works entirely without this index. Sharing here is an optional, free add-on — nothing in the extension depends on this backend being reachable.
docs_menu_body: A menu file has the marker "gesturaMenu": 1 at the top level and describes an in-page menu: a list of items (links, searches or actions such as scrolling and navigation) that appears on matching websites. Each item needs a unique id; a non-separator item must use one of a fixed set of allowed actions.
docs_engine_body: An engine file has the marker "gesturaEngine": 1 and describes a single custom search engine or quick link: a name, an https url template, and optional settings such as result formatting or other behaviour flags. An engine may include transformCode, a small JavaScript snippet that reshapes the search result before it is used.
docs_fields_body: Every entry has an id (a short, reverse-domain-style identifier, e.g. example.com.my-menu) and a version following semantic versioning (major.minor.patch, e.g. 1.2.0). name and, where present, description accept either a plain string or an object keyed by language code, such as an "en" entry alongside a "de" entry, with English used as the fallback when a viewer's language is missing. Menus use patterns (URL match patterns) and items; engines use a url template instead.
docs_rules_body: The server validates every submission with the same rules the extension itself enforces: all URLs (homepage, item links, engine url) must start with https:; ids, names, descriptions and URLs are limited in length; a menu holds at most 100 items and at most 50 patterns; item ids must be unique within a menu; a searchLink item needs either an engineId or a url. Entries that contain transformCode always go through manual moderation before publication, since executable code needs a human look.
about_meta_description: What the Gestura Index is: an optional, free add-on for sharing Gestura menus and search engines, and how it relates to the extension.
about_intro: Gestura Index is a free, optional service for sharing Gestura menus and search engines — website menus, quick searches and links that Gestura users configure and want to share with others.
about_relation_body: The Gestura browser extension works entirely on its own. Nothing in the extension depends on this index being reachable: menus and engines can always be exported and imported directly as files, with no server involved. This site only adds a convenient way to discover and share them.
about_optional_body: Using the index is entirely optional and free of charge. There is no obligation to submit anything here, and browsing, searching and downloading entries requires no account.
about_source_body: Gestura Index is open source. The backend, frontend, and the shared exchange-format schema all live in one public repository.
about_license_body: The project is licensed under the AGPL-3.0-or-later.
privacy_meta_description: How the Gestura Index handles data: no IP storage, anonymous aggregate install counters, and no accounts in this phase.
privacy_intro: Gestura Index is built for data minimization: it collects as little as possible, and nothing that isn't needed to run the service.
privacy_no_ip_body: The API does not persist IP addresses. Requests are not logged with a caller's IP for longer than technically necessary to serve the response.
privacy_counters_body: Downloads increase an anonymous, aggregate install counter per entry. This counter cannot be traced back to an individual person, device, or IP address — it is a simple number, not a log of who downloaded what.
privacy_no_accounts_body: This phase of the index has no user accounts. Submitting, updating or deleting an entry works with an anonymous edit token stored only in your own browser; the server never sees or stores an email address or password.
privacy_public_content_body: Menus and search engines you submit are, by nature, published for others to browse and download — that is the purpose of the index. Only submit content you are comfortable sharing publicly; do not include personal data in names, descriptions or URLs.
privacy_reports_body: Reports about an entry are processed anonymously; no reporter identity is stored alongside a report.
imprint_meta_description: Legal notice for the Gestura Index website: operator details.
imprint_placeholder_note: This page is a placeholder structure. The bracketed fields below must be completed with the operator's actual details before the site goes live.
gestura_hero_tagline: Mouse gestures make your life easier — with smart menus made for GitHub, YouTube, Amazon & co. Fast & 100% private!
gestura_intro: Gestura makes browsing faster with smooth, customizable mouse gestures — no data collection, no tracking, fully open source.
gestura_feat_gestures_body: 16 built-in gestures plus unlimited custom ones.
gestura_feat_menus_body: Ready-made, editable popup menus for the sites you use daily.
gestura_feat_superdrag_body: Drag text, links, or images to trigger actions.
gestura_feat_area_body: Shift+drag to open or copy many links at once.
gestura_feat_wheel_body: Switch tabs by scrolling; back/forward with rocker clicks.
gestura_feat_chains_body: Run several actions from a single gesture.
gestura_shot2: A gesture opens the contextual menu
gestura_shot3: Configurable text and image search engines
gestura_os_body: Gestura is licensed under GPL-3.0 and is a fork of FlowMouse by Hmily[LCG] & Coxxs — huge thanks to them for the original extension.
gestura_index_note: This site — the Gestura Index — lets you share and discover menus and search engines for the extension.
admin_backup_banner: Add a second passkey to protect your account from lockout.
admin_stepup_body: This action needs a fresh passkey confirmation for security.
admin_login_body: Sign in with your passkey to manage the Gestura Index.
